source_context:
Integrated UMC (Universal & Meaningful Connectivity) methodology framework. Four sequential stages flow left to right, connected by dark navy arrows. Below the boxes, a separate horizontal band marks three critical-realism strata aligned to stage positions.

Four stage boxes, each with a number+name top label, one short bottom sub-label, and a simple flat line icon in the middle:
- top '3.1 Measure', bottom 'UMC index', icon grid + target gauge
- top '3.2 Explain', bottom 'multilevel model', icon hierarchical node graph
- top '3.3 Integrate', bottom 'platform signals', icon two speech bubbles
- top '4 Interpret', bottom 'policy targeting', icon table + clock

Below: thin horizontal axis with three filled dots and short bold labels, aligned under boxes: 'Empirical' under 3.1 Measure, 'Actual' under 3.2 Explain, 'Real' under 3.3 Integrate.

Top-left: small title chip 'Integrated UMC Methodology'.

CONSTRAINTS: minimal text only, short labels, no sentences, no subtitle, no paragraph, no topic line. Clean academic flat design, teal/navy palette, simple line icons. All labels English.
communicative_intent: Integrated UMC methodology framework: four sequential stages (3.1 Measure, 3.2 Explain, 3.3 Integrate, 4 Interpret) flow left to right, with a lower band aligning critical-realism strata (Empirical, Actual, Real) to the stage positions.
